hero.name: Miguel Dias
hero.subtitle: Fullstack Web Developer building modern, performant web applications with

about.label: 01 — About
about.title: A bit about me
about.p1: I'm a passionate fullstack web developer with experience building web applications using modern technologies. My journey in tech started as a self-taught developer, and that curiosity and drive to learn has never stopped.
about.p2: I specialize in creating complete digital solutions — from responsive frontends with React and Next.js to robust backends with Node.js and databases. Recently, I've been focused on integrating
about.p2End: into web applications to deliver smarter, more efficient products.
about.p3: Whether it's building a booking platform with payment processing, a CMS-powered website, or an AI-enhanced application, I bring the same commitment to clean code, great UX, and reliable performance.

highlights.title: Fullstack Developer
highlights.description: Building complete web solutions from frontend interfaces to backend APIs and databases.

highlights.title: AI Integration
highlights.description: Developing intelligent solutions that leverage AI to automate processes and enhance user experiences.

highlights.title: Self-Taught
highlights.description: Passionate learner constantly exploring new technologies, frameworks, and best practices.

highlights.title: Portugal Based
highlights.description: Working from Guimaraes, Portugal. Available for remote projects worldwide.

items.description: Built a complete TVDE transport booking platform (soprobinario.pt) with Stripe payments, email notifications, and a Strapi CMS backend, deployed on Vercel + Railway. Integrated Claude and OpenAI APIs into web applications for content automation and intelligent workflows. Delivered production-ready full-stack projects for real clients.
Developed custom web applications for clients including community platforms, admin dashboards, CRUD systems, and e-commerce solutions. Stack: React, Node.js, Material UI, MongoDB, PHP, WordPress.
Learned web development independently from scratch. Built foundational projects in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP. Created YouTube tutorials to share knowledge with the community.

projects.label: 04 — Projects
projects.title: Selected work
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects that showcase my skills in fullstack development and AI integration.

items.title: Sopro Binario
items.description: Full-featured TVDE transport booking platform with Stripe payment integration, email notifications, and a Strapi CMS backend. Deployed on Vercel + Railway.

items.title: TVDE Fleet Automation System
items.description: End-to-end workflow automation for a ride-hailing fleet. Integrates Gmail and Google Drive triggers, processes weekly earnings and expense reports per driver, stores data in Supabase, and delivers automated WhatsApp summaries. Built with n8n (self-hosted on Ubuntu with Docker), reducing manual reporting time by ~80%.

items.title: AI-Integrated Development Workflow
items.description: Systematic use of AI (Claude, GPT-4) to accelerate development cycles — from architecture planning to code generation, review and iterative refinement. Applied across production projects to reduce development time significantly while maintaining code quality.

items.title: React CRUD with Material UI
items.description: Complete CRUD application built with React and Material UI, featuring user management, data validation, and responsive design.

items.title: Authentication System
items.description: User authentication and registration system with React frontend, secure login/register flows, and session management.

items.title: CPMVE Community Platform
items.description: Community website for Electric Micro Vehicle owners in Portugal, featuring information sharing and community engagement features.

items.title: PHP MVC Framework
items.description: Custom MVC framework built from scratch in PHP, demonstrating deep understanding of design patterns and web architecture.

contact.label: 05 — Contact
contact.title: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or want to discuss an opportunity? I'd love to hear from you.
